prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年该科类最低位次分别为约14413、11553、10911、10451、11122名。2021至2024年呈持续前移趋势（从14413升至10451），但2025年出现小幅后移至1 1122名，较2024年后移约671名，近5年波动区间约10451–14413名；该校在江西省理科组招生计划：2021–2023年均为12人，2024年增至17人，2025年进一步扩至 22人；2026年计划27人，较2025年增加5人，扩招幅度约22.7%。持续扩招使竞争面扩大，位次有后移压力。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 上海交通大学为985工程、211工 程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学主榜排名第4位（2026年），属全国顶尖高校层次；上海交通大学医学院为其医学院，临床医学、口腔医学等学科全国领先，对高分考生吸引 力极强；2026年高考周期声誉评价为偏负面，主要涉及学校管理回应、师德师风及学术不端等舆情事件，可能对部分考生报考心理产生一定抑制作用；抖音热度 排名第42位（较热），短视频平台曝光度中等偏高；第五轮学科评估中，上海交通大学临床医学获评A+、口腔医学A+、护理学A-、生物学A+、基础医学（依托生 物学等）实力雄厚。招生专业中临床医学（本博连读）、临床医学（五年制）、口腔方向、护理学等均对应A类学科，学科优势突出。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 临床医学2024年专 业热度评估为推荐，属偏热；口腔医学推荐（72.31）；护理推荐（68.61）。医学类专业整体报考热度较高。江西省2026年高考总人数474900人，物理类估 算约267800人，较2025年物理类266425人略有增加，竞争环境基本稳定略紧；上海交通大学医学院位于上海市，属一线城市，对江西省考生有较强地域吸引力；该校在江西省招生占比相对较小，2025年计划22人占该校全国计划比例不高，跨省竞争格局稳定。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次2025年基准11122名、2026年大幅扩招（+22.7% ）带来的位次后移压力、学校声誉偏负面可能轻微抑制报考热度、医学类专业持续高热、本省考生规模略增等因素，预测2026年最低位次约12589名，较2025年后移约1467名；区 间12089–13089名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 临床医学（本博连读）
- 临床医学（本博连读，口腔方向）
- 临床医学（五年制）
- 临床医学（眼视光方向）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 预防医学（含双学士学位项目）
- 预防医学（卫生事业管理方向，含双学士学位项目）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 护理学（含双学士学位项目）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约12589名，区间12089–13089名。位次在区间下限（12089名）以内可重点冲刺一档临床医学类专业（本博连读及五年制）；位次在区间中段（约12500名）建议以二档 预防医学为主、一档临床医学为冲刺；位次在区间上限（13089名）附近建议以三档护理学保底，同时可尝试二档预防医学。护理学虽为三档但学科评估A-、就业前景良好，适合 求稳考生。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for this subject category were approximately 14413, 11553, 10911, 10451, and 11122 respectively. From 2021 to 2024, there was a continuous upward trend (from 14413 to 10451), but in 2025, there was a slight decline to 11122, a drop of about 671 places compared to 2024. The fluctuation range over the past 5 years is approximately 10451–14413. The university's enrollment plan for science students in Jiangxi Province: 12 students each year from 2021 to 2023, increased to 17 in 2024, further expanded to 22 in 2025, and planned 27 in 2026, an increase of 5 students compared to 2025, with an expansion rate of about 22.7%. Continuous expansion broadens the competition pool, putting downward pressure on rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Shanghai Jiao Tong University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university, ranking 4th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Main Ranking, placing it among the top universities nationwide. Its School of Medicine has nationally leading disciplines such as Clinical Medicine and Stomatology, strongly attracting high-scoring students. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, the reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving incidents such as school management responses, teacher ethics, and academic misconduct, which may have a certain inhibitory effect on some students' application psychology. Douyin popularity ranks 42nd (relatively hot), with moderately high exposure on short video platforms. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Shanghai Jiao Tong University's Clinical Medicine received A+, Stomatology A+, Nursing A-, Biology A+, and Basic Medicine (relying on Biology, etc.) has strong strength. The enrollment majors, including Clinical Medicine (MD-PhD program), Clinical Medicine (five-year program), Stomatology direction, and Nursing, all correspond to A-level disciplines, highlighting the disciplinary advantages.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2024, the popularity evaluation of Clinical Medicine is recommended, relatively hot; Stomatology recommended (72.31); Nursing recommended (68.61). Medical majors overall have high application popularity. In 2026, the total number of Jiangxi Province college entrance examination takers is 474,900, with an estimated 267,800 in the Physics Category, a slight increase from 266,425 in 2025, indicating a basically stable but slightly tight competitive environment. Shanghai Jiao Tong University School of Medicine is located in Shanghai, a first-tier city, which has a strong regional attraction for Jiangxi candidates. The university's enrollment proportion in Jiangxi is relatively small; in 2025, the plan of 22 students accounts for a low proportion of the national plan, and the cross-provincial competition pattern is stable.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 11122, the downward pressure from the significant expansion in 2026 (+22.7%), the slightly negative reputation that may mildly suppress application enthusiasm, the sustained high popularity of medical majors, and the slight increase in the number of local candidates, the predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is approximately 12589, a drop of about 1467 places compared to 2025; range 12089–13089.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Clinical Medicine (MD-PhD Program)
- Clinical Medicine (MD-PhD Program, Stomatology Direction)
- Clinical Medicine (Five-Year Program)
- Clinical Medicine (Ophthalmology and Optometry Direction).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Preventive Medicine (Including Dual Bachelor's Degree Program)
- Preventive Medicine (Health Management Direction, Including Dual Bachelor's Degree Program).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Nursing (Including Dual Bachelor's Degree Program).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking approximately 12589, range 12089–13089. Candidates with rankings within the lower limit of the range (12089) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 Clinical Medicine majors (MD-PhD and five-year programs); those with rankings in the middle of the range (around 12500) are advised to prioritize Tier 2 Preventive Medicine while using Tier 1 Clinical Medicine as a reach; candidates near the upper limit of the range (13089) are advised to use Tier 3 Nursing as a safety, while also attempting Tier 2 Preventive Medicine. Although Nursing is Tier 3, it has a discipline evaluation of A- and good employment prospects, suitable for candidates seeking stability.

prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021年历史类最低位次约7399名，2022年约8750名，2023–2025年无历史类招生数据，说明该校在辽宁历史类招生曾中断；2026年恢复招生；历史类计划2021年8人、2022年12人、2023–2025年无数据、2026年8人，2026年计划与2021年持平，较2022年缩招。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜排名持续上升至2026年第135位；2022年声誉偏负面（宿舍改造问题），近年无重大负面；抖音热度排名第58位，评价"较热"；第五轮学科评估中。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 历史类招生专业为俄语、工商管理类、人文地理与城乡规划，外语类专业热度一般观望，工商管理类分化观望；辽宁省2026年考生总数约20万，与2025年基本持平；石河子大学位于新疆，距辽宁较远，地域偏远的天然劣势对历史类考生影响与物理类类似。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2021年基准位次7399名、2026年恢复招生且计划与2021年持平、考生总数稳定等因素，预计2026年历史类最低位次约7499名，区间6999–7999名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 工商管理类（工商管理、市场营销）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 俄语
- 俄语（旅游方向）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 人文地理与城乡规划。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间6999–7999名内，历史类招生专业较少（仅4个），建议以工商管理类为主力冲刺，俄语和人文地理与城乡规划作为稳妥选择。位次明显优于区间下限（如7000名以内）可重点考虑工商管理类。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: In 2021, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 7399, in 2022 approximately 8750, with no enrollment data from 2023 to 2025, indicating a suspension of History Category enrollment at this university in Liaoning; enrollment resumed in 2026; the History Category plan was 8 students in 2021, 12 in 2022, no data from 2023 to 2025, and 8 in 2026, with the 2026 plan equal to 2021 and reduced compared to 2022.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; the main ranking of Soft Science has continuously risen to 135th in 2026; in 2022, reputation was somewhat negative (dormitory renovation issue), with no major negatives in recent years; Douyin popularity ranking 58th, rated as 'relatively hot'; fifth round of discipline evaluation in progress.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Geography
专业热度与地域.text: History Category majors include Russian, Business Administration, Human Geography and Urban-Rural Planning; foreign language majors are generally lukewarm, Business Administration is differentiated and wait-and-see; the total number of examinees in Liaoning Province in 2026 is approximately 200,000, basically unchanged from 2025; Shihezi University is located in Xinjiang, far from Liaoning, with the natural disadvantage of remote geography affecting History Category students similarly to Physics Category.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2021 baseline ranking of 7399, resumption of enrollment in 2026 with a plan equal to 2021, and stable total number of examinees, it is predicted that the minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 will be approximately 7499, with a range of 6999 to 7999.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult)
- Business Administration (Business Administration, Marketing).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy)
- Human Geography and Urban-Rural Planning.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 6999–7999, History Category has few majors (only 4), so it is recommended to prioritize Business Administration as a main sprint, with Russian and Human Geography and Urban-Rural Planning as safe choices. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit (e.g., within 7000), you can focus on Business Administration.
